title: Monitor wallet balance

title: Add notifications for when an agent starts and finishes work
Set up the MoonPay CLI and wallet for Baron
description:
✅ Done:

- MoonPay CLI wallet created: Solana 4nEcdo9BPGrKK59AqEGdBff3SDjfTAcSNkcvBkBpn6WU, EVM 0x6715d4DA636b50E579f69fa92D620955Bd1A2e07
- Scout deployed to research best Solana DeFi + crypto agent tooling (results incoming)
- MEMORY.md updated with Baron wallet addresses

title: Add activity feed so we can see all that gets shipped /done and by what agent.
description: ✅ Activity feed built and deployed — /activity timeline page, auto-logging on task moves, dashboard strip, sidebar nav

title: Fix task ID chain through agent activation
description: ✅ Updated activate endpoint to pass Task ID + completion curl commands directly in the agent brief so agents can self-update the Kanban.

title: Set up Scout Signal Watch cron
description: ✅ Daily 1pm ET cron — scans last 24h for high-signal x402/MoonPay/Solana/OpenClaw news. Only pings Halsey if genuinely notable.

title: Set up Baron daily treasury report cron
description: ✅ Daily 9am ET cron — checks wallet balances, SOL/USDC prices, sends morning treasury summary to Telegram.

title: Add agent CRUD — edit, delete, create on agents page
description: ✅ Agent CRUD built — edit, delete, create with persistent storage

title: Build Settings page — configure Agent OS
description: ✅ Settings page built — agent budgets, cron management, service status, notification toggles

title: Set up Deal Flow agent — identity + partnership monitoring cron
description: Create DEAL_FLOW.md identity file, set up cron to monitor funding rounds, partnerships, and strategic moves relevant to MoonPay. Daily briefing.

title: Build Inbox widget — surface Gmail on dashboard
description: ✅ Inbox widget on dashboard — surfaces unread Gmail, filters noise, auto-refreshes

title: Wire /chat page to OpenClaw — talk to agents from Mission Control
description: The /chat page should send messages to Vic via OpenClaw gateway and stream responses back. Full two-way chat with agents without needing Telegram.

title: Build Docs page — living knowledge base
description: Searchable docs page surfacing Baron research, Scout reports, Builder architecture decisions, agent memory. Replace the stub with real content.

title: Goal → Task linking — connect goals to tasks
description: Add goal selector when creating/editing tasks. Dashboard shows goal progress based on task completion. Goals page shows linked tasks.

title: Main Dashboard needs a facelift/revamp. Some of the stuff isnt dynamic and some of it is redundant.
